scripts.prebuild: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const p=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('./package.json','utf8')); p.version=p.version.replace(/\d+$/,v=>+v+1); fs.writeFileSync('./package.json', JSON.stringify(p, null, 2)+'\n')"
scripts.build: npm run build:chrome && npm run build:firefox
scripts.build:firefox: FIREFOX=1 vite build && python3 -c "import shutil; shutil.make_archive('avomos-firefox', 'zip', 'dist-firefox')" && mv -f avomos-firefox.zip avomos-firefox.xpi
